name: DURHAM, JOHNSTONE SCHOOL RH2

surface_od_m.qualifier: absent (no Ground Level m AOD box; depths measured from G.L.)

units: metres below ground level, transcribed verbatim — depths are base-of-interval

annotations: no core/cuttings recovered ('No Returns'); lithology inferred as drift from 'Soft Ground' — genuinely unsampled 7 m at hole base

notes: Cable-percussion drift hole; typed strata sheet (job 950197) shares page 1 with RH8 and RH9 — only RH2 transcribed here. Whole log is glacial drift, bottoming at 30.00 m in soft ground with no returns (23.00-30.00). No OD datum given: depths run from G.L. Arithmetic between the two depth points is internally consistent throughout; no clerk slips. Page 1 header spells the site 'DURHAM JOHNSTON SCHOOL, WHINNEY HILL' (no terminal 'e' on Johnston) — task-supplied name 'DURHAM, JOHNSTONE SCHOOL RH2' retained as the record name. Page 2 is a HJT Solmek borehole location plan (drawing 950197/L1, drawn A.C., checked D.B., dated FEB 96, scale 1:1000) with no strata — read for provenance only. BGS blue banner, watermarks and stamps ignored per protocol.
